title: mentha aquatica var. hirsuta
intro: Mentha aquatica var. hirsuta, also known as hairy water mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of hairy water mint include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Hairy water mint can be consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used as a flavoring agent in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures.
